title: Thermal spray coatings in batteries, electrolyzers and solid oxide electrochemical systems
authors: Amrinder Mehta, Hitesh Vasudev, Jashanpreet Singh, Gurbhej Singh
abstract: Energy systems based on electrochemically active materials frequently suffer from poor performance and limited lifetimes due to interfacial problems that can be mitigated by micro- to nanoscale structuring with thermal spray coatings (TSC). This review synthesizes existing knowledge and develops a process-structure-property framework that uniquely links TSC process parameters to the coating microstructure and interfacial chemistry across different electrochemical systems, with a focus on innovative cross-system design principles. This review covers various TSC technologies (atmospheric plasma spray, suspension plasma spray, high-velocity oxy-fuel, and cold spray) with reference to their ability to control porosity and phase distribution. These process parameters affect ion or electron conduction, interfacial resistance, and mechanical stability. The issues of transport limitations caused by porosity, inter-splat bonding, and non-equilibrium phase transformations were studied. Functionally graded interfaces, adaptive coating systems, and machine learning-based process development are innovative approaches investi­gated to achieve defect-tolerant functional interfaces. This study offers guidelines for designing next-generation TSC that are more durable, scalable, and exhibit better electro­chemical properties, thereby improving the performance and lifespan of electrochemical energy systems. The battery, proton exchange membrane, alkaline fuel cells and solid oxide fuel cell/solid oxide electrolysis cell systems were analysed with respect to one another to establish general process-structure-property relationships for electrochemical interfaces.
venue: Journal of Electrochemical Science and Engineering

infographic.key_insight: Thermal spray coatings can be engineered from the process level up to create micro- and nanoscale interfacial structures that improve ion/electron transport, reduce resistance, and extend electrochemical device lifetime.
infographic.engineering_relevance: A unified process-structure-property framework helps translate thermal spray parameters into durable, scalable coatings for batteries, fuel cells, electrolyzers, and solid oxide electrochemical systems.
method: Reviewed four thermal spray routes: atmospheric plasma spray, suspension plasma spray, high-velocity oxy-fuel, and cold spray.
Linked process parameters to porosity, phase distribution, inter-splat bonding, and interfacial chemistry.
Highlighted design strategies such as functionally graded interfaces, adaptive coatings, and machine learning-guided development.
infographic.evidence_signal: The paper is a review that synthesizes prior studies across multiple electrochemical systems to compare how coating microstructure and interfacial chemistry affect transport, resistance, and stability.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains can be limited by porosity, non-equilibrium phase transformations, and other defects that are difficult to control consistently at scale.
infographic.paper_title: Thermal spray coatings in batteries, electrolyzers and solid oxide electrochemical systems

zh-Hans.title: 电池、电解槽和固体氧化物电化学系统中的热喷涂涂层
zh-Hans.abstract: 基于电化学活性材料的能源系统常常由于界面问题而表现出较差的性能和有限的寿命，而这些问题可通过热喷涂涂层（TSC）在微米至纳米尺度上的结构化加以缓解。本综述综合现有知识，并建立了一个工艺-结构-性能框架，独特地将 TSC 工艺参数与不同电化学系统中的涂层微观结构和界面化学联系起来，重点关注跨系统的创新设计原则。本综述涵盖多种 TSC 技术（大气等离子喷涂、悬浮液等离子喷涂、高速氧燃料喷涂和冷喷涂），并参考其对孔隙率和相分布的调控能力。这些工艺参数会影响离子或电子传导、界面电阻以及机械稳定性。研究了由孔隙率、层片间结合以及非平衡相变所引起的传输受限问题。功能梯度界面、自适应涂层系统以及基于机器学习的工艺开发是为实现缺陷容忍型功能界面而研究的创新方法。本研究为设计下一代 TSC 提供了指导，这些涂层将更耐久、可规模化，并具有更好的电化学性能，从而提升电化学能源系统的性能和寿命。本文还对电池、质子交换膜、碱性燃料电池以及固体氧化物燃料电池/固体氧化物电解池系统进行了相互比较分析，以建立电化学界面的一般工艺-结构-性能关系。

infographic.key_insight: 热喷涂涂层可从工艺层面进行设计，构建微米和纳米尺度的界面结构，从而改善离子/电子传输、降低电阻并延长电化学器件寿命。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 统一的工艺-结构-性能框架有助于将热喷涂参数转化为适用于电池、燃料电池、电解槽和固体氧化物电化学系统的耐久、可规模化涂层。
method: 综述了四种热喷涂工艺路线：大气等离子喷涂、悬浮液等离子喷涂、高速氧燃料喷涂和冷喷涂。
将工艺参数与孔隙率、相分布、层片间结合以及界面化学联系起来。
强调了功能梯度界面、自适应涂层和机器学习引导开发等设计策略。
infographic.evidence_signal: 这篇论文是一篇综述，综合了多个电化学系统中的既有研究，用以比较涂层微观结构和界面化学如何影响传输、电阻和稳定性。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升可能受到孔隙率、非平衡相变以及其他缺陷的限制，而这些缺陷在规模化生产中往往难以稳定控制。

title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings
authors: Rakesh Roshan, Akash Mishra, Arka Ghosh, Smruti Rekha Swain, Parth Patel, Pankaj Shrivastava
abstract: Abstract Thermally sprayed coatings are extensively used in aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial applications because of their superior wear, corrosion, and high-temperature resistance. However, the reliable evaluation of coating adhesion and cohesive integrity remains a major challenge due to the complex lamellar microstructure, residual stresses, porosity, and heterogeneous failure behaviour inherent to thermal spray processes. Among the available characterization techniques, the scratch test has emerged as a rapid, versatile, and sensitive approach for assessing coating integrity and tribological performance. Despite its widespread use, the interpretation of scratch test results for thermally sprayed coatings is still fragmented, with significant variations in testing methodologies, failure criteria, and critical load determination techniques. This review critically analyses the scratch test specifically for thermally sprayed coatings by systematically correlating scratch response with coating microstructure, process parameters, residual stress, porosity, and failure mechanisms. The work comprehensively discusses the evolution of scratch testing, different scratching methodologies, operational parameters, and advanced critical load evaluation techniques such as optical microscopy, acoustic emission analysis, and multi-axis force measurements. Furthermore, the study consolidates and compares the findings of a wide range of coating systems processed through APS, HVOF, HVAF, D-gun, and related thermal spray techniques. The novelty of this work lies in providing an integrated and application-oriented perspective that bridges the gap between fundamental scratch mechanics and practical coating performance evaluation. Unlike previous studies that focus on isolated coating systems or individual testing approaches, this review establishes a unified understanding of how coating architecture and processing conditions govern scratch-induced damage and failure evolution. In addition, the manuscript identifies current limitations, inconsistencies in interpretation, and the need for standardization in scratch testing methodologies for thermally sprayed coatings. The present work, therefore serves as a comprehensive reference for researchers and industrial practitioners working toward the design, optimization, and reliable performance assessment of advanced thermal spray coatings.
venue: The International Journal of Advanced Manufacturing Technology

infographic.key_insight: Scratch testing is a fast but imperfect way to assess adhesion and damage evolution in thermally sprayed coatings, and its results depend strongly on coating microstructure and test interpretation.
infographic.engineering_relevance: It helps engineers screen coating integrity and tribological performance across APS, HVOF, HVAF, D-gun, and related spray processes for aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial use.
method: Correlate scratch response with microstructure, porosity, residual stress, and failure mode.
Use critical-load detection methods such as optical microscopy, acoustic emission, and multi-axis force measurement.
Compare outcomes across multiple thermal spray processes and coating systems.
infographic.evidence_signal: The paper is a critical review that consolidates findings from a wide range of thermally sprayed coatings and evaluates how different testing methods affect critical-load interpretation.
infographic.watch_item: Scratch-test results are not standardized and can vary significantly with methodology, so damage criteria and critical-load values should not be compared blindly across studies.
infographic.paper_title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings

zh-Hans.title: 热喷涂涂层划痕试验的批判性分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 热喷涂涂层因其优异的耐磨、耐腐蚀和耐高温性能，广泛应用于航空航天、能源、汽车和工业领域。然而，由于热喷涂过程固有的复杂层状微观结构、残余应力、孔隙率以及非均质失效行为，对涂层结合强度和内聚完整性的可靠评估仍然是一个重大挑战。在现有表征技术中，划痕试验已成为一种快速、多用途且灵敏的方法，可用于评估涂层完整性和摩擦学性能。尽管其应用广泛，热喷涂涂层划痕试验结果的解释仍然较为分散，在测试方法、失效判据和临界载荷确定技术方面存在显著差异。本文针对热喷涂涂层，对划痕试验进行了批判性分析，通过系统关联划痕响应与涂层微观结构、工艺参数、残余应力、孔隙率及失效机制，进行深入讨论。文章全面讨论了划痕测试的发展演变、不同划痕方法、操作参数，以及先进的临界载荷评估技术，如光学显微镜、声发射分析和多轴力测量。此外，本研究整理并比较了采用 APS、HVOF、HVAF、D-gun 及相关热喷涂技术制备的多种涂层体系的研究结果。本文的创新之处在于提供了一个集成化、面向应用的视角，将划痕力学基础与实际涂层性能评估相连接。不同于以往聚焦于单一涂层体系或单一测试方法的研究，本文建立了对涂层架构和加工条件如何支配划痕诱导损伤及失效演化的统一认识。此外，本文还指出了当前解释中的局限性与不一致之处，以及热喷涂涂层划痕测试方法标准化的必要性。因此，本文可作为致力于先进热喷涂涂层设计、优化与可靠性能评估的研究人员和工业实践者的重要综合参考。

infographic.key_insight: 划痕测试是一种快速但并不完美的手段，可用于评估热喷涂涂层的结合强度和损伤演化，其结果强烈依赖于涂层微观结构和测试解释。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 它有助于工程师在航空航天、能源、汽车和工业应用中，针对 APS、HVOF、HVAF、D-gun 及相关喷涂工艺筛选涂层完整性和摩擦学性能。
method: 将划痕响应与微观结构、孔隙率、残余应力和失效模式相关联。
采用临界载荷检测方法，如光学显微镜、声发射和多轴力测量。
比较多种热喷涂工艺和涂层体系下的结果。
infographic.evidence_signal: 本文是一篇批判性综述，汇总了多种热喷涂涂层的研究结果，并评估不同测试方法如何影响临界载荷的解释。
infographic.watch_item: 划痕试验结果尚未标准化，且会随方法而显著变化，因此不应在不同研究之间盲目比较损伤判据和临界载荷值。

title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images
authors: Ata Jahangir Moshayedi, Amir Sohail Khan, Ming Jun Zhang, Shuxin Yang, David Bassir
abstract: Weld defect detection plays a central role in pipeline inspection because it directly influences structural reliability and operational safety.Conventional manual inspection methods suffer from several limitations, including high labor demands, subjective judgment, and inconsistent results, which restrict their effectiveness in large-scale industrial applications. To overcome these challenges, this study evaluates the use of the lightweight convolutional neural network MobileNetV3, considering both its Small and Large configurations, for automatic multi-class classification of pipeline weld defects.The proposed approach integrates image preprocessing and data augmentation with a lightweight deep learning architecture to extract discriminative visual features from weld images. Experimental validation is carried out using two datasets acquired under practical inspection conditions. The AI5083 dataset contains 4,927 images captured using HDR cameras, while the PWDID dataset includes 78 images collected with a mobile phone camera in uncontrolled environments.The experimental results demonstrate strong classification performance, achieving an accuracy of 99.99% on the AI5083 dataset and improved results on the PWDID dataset. Compared with previously reported methods, the proposed approach yields an accuracy improvement of approximately 3%, indicating its robustness across different acquisition settings. In addition to its high accuracy, MobileNetV3 offers fast inference, low memory consumption, and reduced power requirements. Owing to these characteristics and ias compatibility with deployment frameworks such as TensorFlow Lite, ONNX, and CoreML, MobileNetV3 is well suited for mobile and handheld inspection tools. Based on these findings, the use of MobileNetV3 and other modern lightweight architectures along with denoised function are recommended for practical, on device pipeline weld defect inspection systems.

infographic.key_insight: A lightweight MobileNetV3 classifier can detect multiple pipeline weld defect classes with very high accuracy, even on noisy RGB images from different capture conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach supports fast, low-power, on-device inspection for pipeline welding quality control, making automated defect screening more practical in field deployments.
method: Preprocess weld images and apply data augmentation to improve robustness.
Train and compare MobileNetV3-Small and MobileNetV3-Large for multi-class defect classification.
Evaluate performance on two real-world datasets collected with HDR cameras and a mobile phone under uncontrolled conditions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 99.99% accuracy on the 4,927-image AI5083 dataset and improved performance on the 78-image PWDID dataset, with about a 3% gain over prior methods.
infographic.watch_item: The very small PWDID dataset and noisy acquisition conditions suggest that broader external validation is still needed before deployment in diverse industrial environments.
infographic.paper_title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images

zh-Hans.title: 用于管道焊接缺陷检测的 MobileNetV3：一种针对噪声 RGB 图像的计算机视觉方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊缝缺陷检测在管道检测中占据核心地位，因为它直接影响结构可靠性和运行安全。传统人工检测方法存在多种局限，包括劳动强度高、判断主观性强以及结果不一致，这些因素限制了其在大规模工业应用中的有效性。为克服这些挑战，本研究评估了轻量级卷积神经网络 MobileNetV3（包括 Small 和 Large 两种配置）在管道焊缝缺陷自动多类别分类中的应用。所提出的方法将图像预处理和数据增强与轻量级深度学习架构相结合，从焊缝图像中提取具有判别性的视觉特征。实验验证使用了两个在实际检测条件下采集的数据集。AI5083 数据集包含 4,927 张使用 HDR 相机拍摄的图像，而 PWDID 数据集包含 78 张在非受控环境下使用手机相机采集的图像。实验结果表明，该方法具有很强的分类性能，在 AI5083 数据集上实现了 99.99% 的准确率，并在 PWDID 数据集上取得了更好的结果。与先前报道的方法相比，该方法的准确率提高了约 3%，表明其在不同采集条件下具有较强的鲁棒性。除高准确率外，MobileNetV3 还具有推理速度快、内存占用低和功耗需求低等优点。由于这些特性，以及其与 TensorFlow Lite、ONNX 和 CoreML 等部署框架的兼容性，MobileNetV3 非常适用于移动式和手持式检测工具。基于这些发现，建议在面向实际、端侧管道焊缝缺陷检测系统中使用 MobileNetV3 及其他现代轻量级架构，并结合去噪功能。

infographic.key_insight: 轻量级 MobileNetV3 分类器即使面对来自不同采集条件的噪声 RGB 图像，也能够以很高的准确率检测多种管道焊缝缺陷类别。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法支持快速、低功耗、端侧检测，使管道焊接质量控制中的自动缺陷筛查在现场部署中更具可行性。
method: 对焊缝图像进行预处理并应用数据增强，以提高鲁棒性。
训练并比较 MobileNetV3-Small 和 MobileNetV3-Large，用于多类别缺陷分类。
在使用 HDR 相机和手机在非受控条件下采集的两个真实世界数据集上评估性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了在包含 4,927 张图像的 AI5083 数据集上达到 99.99% 的准确率，并在包含 78 张图像的 PWDID 数据集上取得了更好的性能，相比先前方法约提升 3%。
infographic.watch_item: PWDID 数据集规模非常小且采集条件存在噪声，这表明在多样化工业环境中部署之前，仍需要更广泛的外部验证。

title: CNN-based acoustic spectrogram analysis for quality assessment of laser-welded screws
authors: Ilinca-Laura BURDULEA, Xiaoxu Zhang, Jörg Brünnhäußer, Jascha Seleenmeyer
abstract: Laser welding offers high precision and efficiency but remains challenging to inspect for internal defects using conventional Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) methods. This study presents a contact-free, post-process inspection framework combining laser-induced acoustic excitation with Deep Learning (DL)-based spectrogram analysis for automated weld quality assessment. Acoustic responses from welded screw elements were recorded using a membranefree optical microphone and converted into time-frequency spectrograms. A Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) was trained to classify weld integrity based on these spectrograms, outperforming classical Machine Learning (ML) baselines that relied on manually engineered features. The optimized CNN achieved 93.5% accuracy at the segment level and 92.9% at the specimen level, demonstrating reliable discrimination between defect-free and defective welds. Hyperparameter optimization revealed that spectrogram resolution and network depth were the primary performance drivers. The proposed method establishes a foundation for scalable, AI-driven, and non-contact Quality Assurance (QA) in laser-based manufacturing. Future work will extend the system toward multi-class defect characterization and real-time deployment.

infographic.key_insight: Laser-induced acoustic spectrograms, classified with a CNN, can non-contactly distinguish defect-free from defective laser-welded screws with high accuracy.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables scalable post-process quality assurance for laser welding without relying on traditional contact-based NDT methods.
method: Record laser-induced acoustic responses with a membrane-free optical microphone
Convert signals into time-frequency spectrograms
Train a CNN and compare it with classical ML baselines using engineered features
infographic.evidence_signal: The optimized CNN reached 93.5% accuracy at the segment level and 92.9% at the specimen level, outperforming baseline ML approaches.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends strongly on spectrogram resolution and network depth, so robustness across materials, geometries, and production conditions still needs validation.
infographic.paper_title: CNN-based acoustic spectrogram analysis for quality assessment of laser-welded screws

zh-Hans.title: 基于 CNN 的声学频谱分析用于激光焊接螺钉的质量评估
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接具有高精度和高效率，但使用传统无损检测（NDT）方法对内部缺陷进行检测仍然具有挑战性。本研究提出了一种非接触式、后处理检测框架，将激光诱导声学激励与基于深度学习（DL）的频谱分析相结合，用于自动化焊缝质量评估。通过无膜光学麦克风记录焊接螺钉元件的声学响应，并将其转换为时频频谱图。随后训练卷积神经网络（CNN）基于这些频谱图对焊缝完整性进行分类，其性能优于依赖手工设计特征的经典机器学习（ML）基线方法。优化后的 CNN 在片段级达到 93.5% 的准确率，在试样级达到 92.9% 的准确率，表明其能够可靠区分无缺陷焊缝和有缺陷焊缝。超参数优化表明，频谱分辨率和网络深度是影响性能的主要因素。所提出的方法为激光制造中可扩展、由 AI 驱动的非接触式质量保证（QA）奠定了基础。未来工作将把该系统扩展到多类别缺陷表征和实时部署。

infographic.key_insight: 经 CNN 分类的激光诱导声学频谱可在非接触条件下以较高准确率区分无缺陷与有缺陷的激光焊接螺钉。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得激光焊接能够在不依赖传统接触式 NDT 方法的情况下实现可扩展的后处理质量保证。
method: 使用无膜光学麦克风记录激光诱导的声学响应
将信号转换为时频频谱图
训练 CNN，并使用工程化特征将其与经典 ML 基线进行比较
infographic.evidence_signal: 优化后的 CNN 在片段级达到 93.5% 的准确率，在试样级达到 92.9% 的准确率，优于基线 ML 方法。
infographic.watch_item: 性能对频谱分辨率和网络深度高度敏感，因此仍需在不同材料、几何形状和生产条件下验证其鲁棒性。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A transfer-learning plus hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász optimization makes BiSeNetV2 much more robust to reflective seams without adding model size or speed cost.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This provides a practical lightweight perception upgrade for real-time robotic welding in construction, where harsh lighting and metal reflections often break seam detection.
method: Fine-tune a BiSeNetV2 backbone with transfer learning for seam segmentation.
Use a hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász loss to stabilize learning and improve boundary quality.
Keep the architecture unchanged to preserve FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed.
infographic.evidence_signal: The method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline and recovering 96.33% of severe zero-IoU failures under reflective conditions.
infographic.watch_item: Results are compelling for reflective welding scenes, but deployment still depends on domain match and the availability of representative seam images from the target construction environment.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强施工场景中自动焊接机器人的焊缝分割：解决双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 在施工场景中的自主机器人焊接中，可靠的焊缝分割至关重要，但恶劣照明、镜面反射以及细窄的焊缝几何形态常常会降低分割性能。本研究提出一种抗反射的焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失对 BiSeNetV2 主干网络进行增强。该框架并未增加架构复杂度，而是通过面向学习稳定性的优化来提升抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提方法实现了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，在保持相同 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度的同时，相比基于 OHEM 的基线方法，Joint IoU 提升了 22.36 个百分点。所提方法还恢复了反射条件下 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失效样本。针对 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，该优化策略对于轻量级实时分割架构尤为有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均有所提升。这些结果表明，该框架为涉及反光金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量化的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 迁移学习结合混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 优化，使 BiSeNetV2 在不增加模型规模或速度成本的情况下，对反光焊缝的鲁棒性大幅提升。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为施工中的实时机器人焊接提供了一种实用的轻量化感知升级方案，因为强光和金属反射常常会破坏焊缝检测。
method: 使用迁移学习对 BiSeNetV2 主干网络进行微调，以完成焊缝分割。
采用混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 损失，以稳定学习过程并提升边界质量。
保持架构不变，以保留 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法达到了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，相比 OHEM 基线的 Joint IoU 提升了 22.36 个百分点，并在反射条件下恢复了 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失效样本。
infographic.watch_item: 该结果在反光焊接场景中具有说服力，但实际部署仍取决于领域匹配程度以及目标施工环境中是否具备具有代表性的焊缝图像。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: High-velocity air fuel (HVAF) spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and shape-memory functionality, even with some microstructural inhomogeneity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical route to functional NiTi surface layers for wear-, corrosion-, and thermally responsive components where conventional coating methods struggle.
method: HVAF-sprayed NiTi onto mild steel using four processing parameter sets.
Characterized composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation, and thermomechanical response.
Compared as-sprayed and annealed coating behavior under bending, nanoindentation, and scratch loading.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 100–300 µm coatings that adhered well to the substrate and showed martensitic transformation plus thermal actuation and shape-memory effects after annealing.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings are microstructurally defective and require annealing; tensile strength remains limited, so processing control and service loading must be managed carefully.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：显微组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程构件表面沉积各种涂层，以改善其在耐磨、耐腐蚀、减摩和热防护方面的性能，已是一种标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可作为硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层还因其独特的功能性热机械特性而具有额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层一直较为困难。常规电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最广泛使用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学成分不均匀、且不能发生马氏体转变的涂层，而冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体结合不良的问题。在这项工作中，我们报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um），其既表现出功能性热机械特性，又与基体具有非常良好的附着性。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢上使用四组不同的工艺参数制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变以及功能性热机械特性进行了评估。尽管涂层包含不均匀显微组织、空洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但其在冷却和/或机械加载过程中会发生马氏体转变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要退火才能表现出功能性热机械特性。尽管其抗拉强度有限，这些涂层仍在三点弯曲试验中表现出热致驱动效应，并在纳米压痕和划痕试验中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: 高速空气燃料（HVAF）喷涂能够制备出厚NiTi涂层，即使存在一定的显微组织不均匀性，仍可保持马氏体转变和形状记忆功能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为耐磨、耐腐蚀以及对热响应的部件提供了一条实用的功能性NiTi表层制备途径，而传统涂层方法在这方面往往难以胜任。
method: 采用四组工艺参数将HVAF喷涂NiTi沉积到低碳钢上。
对成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变和热机械响应进行表征。
比较喷涂态与退火态涂层在弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕载荷下的行为。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了100–300 µm的涂层，其与基体结合良好，并在退火后表现出马氏体转变以及热致驱动和形状记忆效应。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层存在显微组织缺陷且需要退火；抗拉强度仍然有限，因此必须谨慎控制工艺并管理服役载荷。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet predicts laser weld penetration with high accuracy by combining physics-informed self-supervised feature learning with few-shot classification, reducing dependence on large labeled datasets.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables faster, more practical quality control for laser welding, supporting intelligent automation and defect reduction in industrial manufacturing.
method: Physics-informed neural network learns physically meaningful molten-pool and keyhole features from unlabeled images
Three image augmentation tasks strengthen contrastive self-supervised representation learning
Prototypical networks classify penetration state using only a small labeled subset
infographic.evidence_signal: The model achieved 96.06% classification accuracy using only 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset, comparable to fully supervised methods.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of unlabeled welding images and on how well the learned physical priors transfer to new welding setups.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 基于物理约束神经网络、采用自监督学习的激光焊接过程焊深预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全焊透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测焊接熔深状态对于保证焊接质量至关重要。为此，本文提出 SimPhysNet，一种新型算法，仅利用少量标注图像即可在激光焊接熔深预测中实现较高的分类精度。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性，因为这类算法在工业应用中受制于对大量高质量标注数据的依赖。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，它将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架中。通过引入物理约束神经网络（PINN），该模型被引导从大量未标注数据中提取熔池和小孔的物理意义特征，同时三种图像增强任务进一步提升了其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的小样本学习策略通过仅由少量标注图像构建类别表征，实现了稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占全部标注数据集的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，性能可与使用全部标注数据集的传统监督学习算法相媲美。该工作提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能化自动化提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 通过将物理约束的自监督特征学习与小样本分类相结合，以高精度预测激光焊缝熔深，从而减少对大规模标注数据集的依赖。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这有助于实现更快速、更实用的激光焊接质量控制，支持工业制造中的智能化自动化和缺陷减少。
method: 物理约束神经网络从未标注图像中学习具有物理意义的熔池和小孔特征
三种图像增强任务增强对比式自监督表征学习
原型网络仅使用少量标注子集对熔深状态进行分类
infographic.evidence_signal: 该模型仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占标注数据集的 5%）就达到了 96.06% 的分类准确率，与全监督方法相当。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于未标注焊接图像的质量和代表性，以及所学习的物理先验向新的焊接工况迁移的程度。

title: Making Technical & Vocational Education Accessible to the Grassroots Students through Digital Learning
authors: Zahirul Alam
abstract: This paper explores the integration of digital learning platforms into technical and vocational education to enhance accessibility for grassroots students. Addressing the limitations of the traditional vocational system, this system struggles to meet the growing demand for skilled workers. To address these challenges, the proposed model leverages digital platforms, such as YouTube, to deliver theoretical knowledge in essential vocational areas, including welding, General Electrical, Electronics, Dressmaking, Civil Construction, and IT. This approach delivers free, accessible content enhanced with interactive 3D models and live sessions, increasing the flexibility of vocational education. Classes are designed in clear, easily understandable language and uploaded to YouTube to reach a broad audience. Upon completing the courses, students undertake an open-book examination. This online assessment will serve to measure their credibility and ensure they have grasped the material. The methodology combines online and offline learning to deliver comprehensive, industry-aligned education, incorporating partnerships with technical institutions for advanced training and certifications. Additionally, the paper highlights how the model itself operates as a social business, integrating financial sustainability with social impact. This model bridges the vocational education gap in remote areas, offering accessible learning opportunities to all students. By offering these courses, it aims to reduce unemployment and contribute to national economic growth.

infographic.key_insight: A digital-learning, social-business model can expand access to technical and vocational education for grassroots students by delivering free, understandable vocational content online and pairing it with open-book assessment.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For welding and other shop-floor disciplines, the approach can improve workforce readiness by combining scalable theory delivery with offline practical training and certification partnerships.
method: Publish vocational theory lessons on YouTube in simple language
Enhance lessons with interactive 3D models and live sessions
Use open-book online exams plus offline institution-based practical training
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports a proposed model rather than experimental results, so effectiveness is framed by intended accessibility, flexibility, and employability outcomes rather than measured data.
infographic.watch_item: Access, device availability, and the need to preserve hands-on skill quality may limit impact if online theory is not matched by sufficient practical training.
infographic.paper_title: Making Technical & Vocational Education Accessible to the Grassroots Students through Digital Learning

zh-Hans.title: 通过数字化学习让基层学生获得技术与职业教育
zh-Hans.abstract: 本文探讨将数字化学习平台融入技术与职业教育，以提升基层学生的可及性。针对传统职业教育体系的局限性，该体系难以满足日益增长的技能型劳动力需求。为应对这些挑战，所提出的模型利用 YouTube 等数字平台，向焊接、普通电工、电子、裁缝制作、土木工程施工以及 IT 等关键职业领域提供理论知识。该方法通过免费、可获取的内容，并结合交互式 3D 模型和直播课程，提高职业教育的灵活性。课程以清晰、易懂的语言设计，并上传至 YouTube，以覆盖更广泛的受众。课程完成后，学生参加开卷考试。该在线评估将用于衡量其可信度，并确保其已掌握相关材料。该方法将线上与线下学习相结合，提供全面、与行业接轨的教育，并与技术院校合作开展高级培训和认证。此外，本文强调该模型本身如何作为一种社会企业运作，将财务可持续性与社会影响相结合。该模型弥合了偏远地区的职业教育鸿沟，为所有学生提供可获得的学习机会。通过开设这些课程，其目标是减少失业并促进国家经济增长。

infographic.key_insight: 数字化学习与社会企业相结合的模型，可通过在线提供免费且易懂的职业内容，并配合开卷评估，扩大基层学生接受技术与职业教育的机会。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于焊接及其他车间类学科，该方法可通过可扩展的理论传授与线下实践培训及认证合作相结合，提高劳动力就绪度。
method: 使用简单语言在 YouTube 上发布职业理论课程
通过交互式 3D 模型和直播课程增强教学内容
采用在线开卷考试，并结合线下院校实践培训
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告的是一个拟议模型，而非实验结果，因此其有效性主要从预期的可及性、灵活性和就业能力提升等结果来表述，而不是基于测量数据。
infographic.watch_item: 如果在线理论学习未能与足够的实践培训相匹配，获取渠道、设备可用性以及保持动手技能质量的需求可能会限制其影响。

title: Assessment of the Strength of Welded Joints in a Gas Pipeline Using FEM Modeling
authors: Olha Zvirko, Ihor Dzioba, Tadeusz Pała, D. O. Demianchuk, Oleksandr Tsyrulnyk
abstract: Repurposing existing natural gas pipelines for hydrogen service requires an assessment of their current technical condition and remaining lifetime, especially those that may have reached or exceeded their design life. In this study, the strength of welded joints in the X52 steel gas pipeline after 36 years of operation and in the as-received state was investigated, focusing on circumferential welded joints. Hardness distributions in the welded joint zones (the weld metal, the heat-affected zone and the base metal) were determined, and the values of the material’s strength and plasticity characteristics were estimated based on the correlation equations. This enables assessment of the stress–strain relationships for the metal from different zones of welded joints, which were compared with the experimental results determined from uniaxial tensile testing. Finite element models of welded joints were developed, in which the relevant material zones were defined in accordance with established stress–strain relationships, and the stress–strain distributions in the welded joints subjected to simulated tensile loading were determined, identifying the areas under the greatest stress. For the welded joint after 36 years of operation, the normalized graphs show higher relative extreme values of σ11/σys = 1.25 compared to the as-received state, where σ11/σys = 1.1. In the as-received welded joint, strain concentration was observed for a stress load about 5% lower than the σys of the base metal, while in the operated one, a local strain increase was observed for a load even 11% lower than the σys of the base metal.

infographic.key_insight: Finite-element modeling linked hardness-derived material properties to predict stress and strain hot spots in 36-year-old and as-received X52 pipeline welds.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The results help judge whether aging gas-pipeline welded joints can still support safe operation or repurposing for hydrogen service.
method: Measured hardness across weld metal, heat-affected zone, and base metal.
Estimated strength and plasticity from hardness using correlation equations and built zone-specific stress–strain curves.
Simulated tensile loading in FEM to map stress/strain distributions and identify peak-stress regions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The operated weld showed a higher normalized peak stress ratio (σ11/σys = 1.25) than the as-received joint (1.1), and strain concentration occurred at loads below base-metal yield in both cases.
infographic.watch_item: Hardness-based property estimation and simulated tensile loading should be validated against broader experimental datasets before using the model for life-extension decisions.
infographic.paper_title: Assessment of the Strength of Welded Joints in a Gas Pipeline Using FEM Modeling

zh-Hans.title: 采用有限元建模评估燃气管道焊接接头强度
zh-Hans.abstract: 将现有天然气管道改作氢气输送用途，需要评估其当前技术状况和剩余寿命，尤其是那些可能已达到或超过设计寿命的管道。本研究针对服役36年后的X52钢燃气管道及其到货原始状态下的焊接接头强度进行了研究，重点关注环焊缝接头。测定了焊接接头各区域（焊缝金属、热影响区和母材）的硬度分布，并基于相关关系式估算了材料的强度和塑性特性参数。这使得可以评估焊接接头不同区域金属的应力—应变关系，并将其与单轴拉伸试验得到的实验结果进行比较。建立了焊接接头的有限元模型，其中相关材料区域依据已建立的应力—应变关系进行定义，并确定了在模拟拉伸载荷作用下焊接接头中的应力—应变分布，从而识别出最大应力区域。对于服役36年的焊接接头，归一化图显示其相对极值σ11/σys = 1.25，高于到货原始状态下的σ11/σys = 1.1。在到货原始焊接接头中，约比母材σys低5%的应力载荷下观察到应变集中；而在服役接头中，即使在比母材σys低11%的载荷下也观察到了局部应变增加。

infographic.key_insight: 有限元建模将由硬度推得的材料性能联系起来，用于预测服役36年和到货原始状态X52管道焊缝中的应力和应变热点。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这些结果有助于判断老化燃气管道焊接接头是否仍能安全运行，或是否可改作氢气输送用途。
method: 测量焊缝金属、热影响区和母材的硬度。
利用相关方程根据硬度估算强度和塑性，并建立各区域特定的应力—应变曲线。
在有限元分析（FEM）中模拟拉伸载荷，以绘制应力/应变分布并识别峰值应力区域。
infographic.evidence_signal: 服役焊缝的归一化峰值应力比（σ11/σys = 1.25）高于到货原始接头（1.1），且两种情况下都在低于母材屈服的载荷下出现应变集中。
infographic.watch_item: 基于硬度的性能估算和模拟拉伸载荷应在更广泛的实验数据集上进行验证后，才能用于寿命延长决策。

title: Design and Implementation Strategy of Information Construction Management System Based on Internet of Things Technology and AI Algorithm in Oil and Gas Pipeline Construction
authors: Huanjie Wei, Tongyu Wu, Jian Sun, Baozhu Zhang, Weiliang Wang
abstract: Abstract In view of the problems such as information lag and regulatory blind spots caused by the long oil and gas pipeline construction front, this study proposes an information construction management system that integrates the Internet of Things and artificial intelligence. The research mainly builds a cloud-edge multi-source perception system, and introduces a lightweight visual detection algorithm with a depth-separable residual module and a reconstructed complete intersection-union ratio loss function. A multi-factor fuzzy comprehensive evaluation and an improved particle swarm optimization algorithm are integrated to establish a dynamic optimization model for trench support parameters. The results showed that the average accuracy of the lightweight algorithm was 71.6%. The improved particle swarm optimization algorithm reduced the support cost to only 3,340 yuan/meter. Six months after implementing the system, the on-site illegal operation capture rate jumped to 96.8%, the one-time welding pass rate reached 98.2%, the hidden danger response time plummeted to 4.2 minutes, the rework rate was only 1.1%, and the comprehensive management cost was saved by 28.6%. It shows that the information-based construction management system effectively realizes highly reliable engineering risk warning and parameter optimization, and provides a reliable implementation plan for the safety management and control, quality improvement, cost reduction and efficiency improvement of modern smart oil and gas pipeline networks.

infographic.key_insight: An IoT-plus-AI construction management system can turn pipeline jobsite data into real-time safety warnings and parameter optimization for safer, cheaper oil and gas pipeline construction.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach is directly relevant to field engineering because it improves trench support decisions, welding quality oversight, and risk control across long, dispersed pipeline projects.
method: Built a cloud-edge multi-source perception system for on-site monitoring.
Used a lightweight visual detection model with depth-separable residual modules and a revised IoU-based loss.
Combined fuzzy comprehensive evaluation with improved particle swarm optimization to tune trench support parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 71.6% average detection accuracy, 96.8% illegal-operation capture rate, 98.2% one-time welding pass rate, 4.2-minute hazard response time, and 28.6% cost savings after six months.
infographic.watch_item: The reported detection accuracy is moderate, so deployment quality may depend on site conditions, camera coverage, and reliable edge-cloud connectivity.
infographic.paper_title: Design and Implementation Strategy of Information Construction Management System Based on Internet of Things Technology and AI Algorithm in Oil and Gas Pipeline Construction

zh-Hans.title: 基于物联网技术与AI算法的油气管道施工信息化管理系统设计与实施策略
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 针对油气管道施工战线长导致的信息滞后和监管盲区等问题，本研究提出了一种融合物联网和人工智能的信息化施工管理系统。研究主要构建了云-边多源感知系统，并引入了带有深度可分离残差模块和重构的完整交并比损失函数的轻量化视觉检测算法。将多因素模糊综合评价与改进粒子群优化算法相结合，建立了基于沟槽支护参数的动态优化模型。结果表明，轻量化算法的平均准确率为71.6%。改进粒子群优化算法将支护成本降低至仅3,340元/米。系统实施6个月后，现场违章作业抓拍率跃升至96.8%，一次焊接合格率达到98.2%，隐患响应时间骤降至4.2分钟，返工率仅为1.1%，综合管理成本节约28.6%。这表明该信息化施工管理系统有效实现了高可靠性的工程风险预警和参数优化，为现代智慧油气管网的安全管理与控制、质量提升、降本增效提供了可靠的实施方案。

infographic.key_insight: 物联网+AI施工管理系统能够将管道工地数据转化为实时安全预警和参数优化，从而实现更安全、更低成本的油气管道施工。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法与现场工程直接相关，因为它提升了沟槽支护决策、焊接质量监管以及长距离、分散式管道工程中的风险控制能力。
method: 构建用于现场监测的云-边多源感知系统。
采用带有深度可分离残差模块和修正IoU损失函数的轻量化视觉检测模型。
将模糊综合评价与改进粒子群优化相结合，以调节沟槽支护参数。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告的结果包括：平均检测准确率71.6%，违章作业抓拍率96.8%，一次焊接合格率98.2%，隐患响应时间4.2分钟，以及实施6个月后的28.6%成本节约。
infographic.watch_item: 报告的检测准确率处于中等水平，因此部署效果可能取决于现场条件、摄像头覆盖范围以及边云连接的可靠性。

title: Classification of welding-induced residual stresses in gusset joints
authors: J. Riski, T. Pesonen, T. Skriko, A. Ahola
abstract: Residual stresses generated during welding are well-recognised as a critical factor in structural integrity and design. Advances in computational modelling have enabled increasingly accurate characterisation of residual stress fields, facilitating their integration into modern structural assessments. This study aims to improve the interpretation of welding-induced residual stresses by decomposing them into primary, secondary and tertiary components, and by examining their evolution under varying mechanical boundary conditions and geometrical configurations. To achieve this, a fully coupled thermo-mechanical finite element welding simulation with a validated heat source was employed to model the welding process and quantify residual stresses near a longitudinally welded-around gusset fabricated from quenched-and-tempered 690 high-strength steel. The residual stress state was evaluated both as a total resultant at the weld toe, and through its decomposition into primary and secondary membrane and bending components, together with tertiary nonlinear components. The residual stress components were analysed across the plate width and thickness under varying boundary conditions. A parametric study considered three plate widths and five support configurations at two support distances. The results show that variation in the total residual stress after welding is relatively limited and mainly determined by the support distance, support condition, and support release. In contrast, the magnitudes and distributions of the individual stress components exhibit significantly greater variation, providing insight into the mechanisms underlying the total residual stress state. The findings highlight the importance of joint geometry and welding boundary conditions when assessing welding-induced residual stresses and their influence on the load-carrying capacity of welded structures.

infographic.key_insight: Welding-induced residual stresses in gusset joints are governed more by boundary/support conditions and geometry than by the overall total stress level alone, because the stress field splits into distinct primary, secondary, and tertiary components.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For welded structural design, decomposing residual stress into membrane, bending, and nonlinear parts helps explain load-carrying capacity and improves assessment of high-strength steel joints.
method: Fully coupled thermo-mechanical finite element welding simulation with a validated heat source.
Modelled a longitudinally welded-around gusset in quenched-and-tempered 690 high-strength steel.
Parametric study over three plate widths, five support configurations, and two support distances.
infographic.evidence_signal: The simulation results show limited variation in total residual stress after welding, while individual stress components vary strongly with support distance, support condition, and support release.
infographic.watch_item: The findings are simulation-based for one gusset-joint geometry and material system, so broader use should be checked against experiments and other joint designs.
infographic.paper_title: Classification of welding-induced residual stresses in gusset joints

zh-Hans.title: 角钢节点中焊接引起的残余应力分类
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊接过程中产生的残余应力被公认为结构完整性和设计中的关键因素。计算建模的进展使得对残余应力场的表征日益精确，从而便于将其纳入现代结构评估中。本研究旨在通过将焊接引起的残余应力分解为一次、二次和三次分量，并考察其在不同机械边界条件和几何构型下的演化，以改进对焊接残余应力的理解。为此，采用了经验证热源的完全耦合热-力有限元焊接模拟，对焊接过程进行建模，并量化了经淬火回火的690高强钢制造的纵向环焊角钢附近的残余应力。残余应力状态既以焊趾处的总合力进行评估，也通过分解为一次和二次膜应力及弯曲分量，以及三次非线性分量进行评估。在不同边界条件下，对板宽和厚度方向上的残余应力分量进行了分析。参数化研究考虑了三种板宽、五种支撑配置以及两种支撑距离。结果表明，焊后总残余应力的变化相对有限，主要由支撑距离、支撑条件和支撑释放所决定。相比之下，各个应力分量的幅值和分布表现出显著更大的变化，为理解总残余应力状态背后的机制提供了洞见。研究结果强调，在评估焊接引起的残余应力及其对焊接结构承载能力的影响时，接头几何和焊接边界条件的重要性。

infographic.key_insight: 角钢节点中的焊接引起残余应力更多受边界/支撑条件和几何形状支配，而不仅仅取决于总应力水平，因为应力场可分解为不同的一次、二次和三次分量。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于焊接结构设计，将残余应力分解为膜应力、弯曲和非线性部分，有助于解释承载能力，并改进对高强钢接头的评估。
method: 采用经验证热源的完全耦合热-力有限元焊接模拟。
对经淬火回火的690高强钢纵向环焊角钢进行建模。
开展涵盖三种板宽、五种支撑配置和两种支撑距离的参数化研究。
infographic.evidence_signal: 仿真结果表明，焊后总残余应力的变化有限，而各个应力分量会随支撑距离、支撑条件和支撑释放显著变化。
infographic.watch_item: 这些结论基于针对一种角钢节点几何和材料体系的仿真，因此更广泛的应用应结合实验和其他接头设计进行验证。

title: Interfacial joining and in-situ resistance monitoring in ultrasonic hybrid riveting–welding of CFRTP and titanium alloy
authors: Yu-Yao Ren, Bin Han, Qi-Yuan Yan, Jie Yang, Wei Yu-fan, Qi Zhang
abstract: Hybrid joining of titanium alloys and carbon fiber-reinforced thermoplastic composites (CFRTP) is essential for lightweight aerospace applications but limited by interfacial weaknesses and inadequate monitoring. This work proposes an ultrasonic CFRTP-rivet-based hybrid riveting–welding strategy for joining continuous carbon fiber-reinforced polycarbonate (CF/PC) composites and Ti-6Al-4 V (TC4) titanium alloy. The method integrates hot riveting of a same-material CF/PC rivet with dissimilar-interface ultrasonic welding within a single joining cycle, while surface grooving and anodic oxidation of TC4 are introduced as supporting interface-engineering measures to strengthen interfacial bonding. This approach improved the joint shear strength by 11.08%, and increased the cross-lap tensile strength by 128.6% compared to the direct weld. Microscopic analysis revealed the joint formation to be governed mainly by macro-/micro-mechanical interlocking together with possible interfacial chemical interaction. Furthermore, an in-situ interfacial resistance monitoring method was implemented throughout both the welding process and subsequent mechanical loading. Distinct resistance stages during welding corresponded to interfacial evolution phases, with the final joint resistance further used to establish a preliminary prediction model for joint strength. During single lap tensile-shear, cyclic loading, and cross lap tensile tests, real-time resistance changes reflected the progressive evolution of internal damage, indicating the potential of this method for structural health monitoring. As a metal-fastener-free and adhesive-independent solution, this integrated approach of joint reinforcement and resistance-based monitoring offers simplified processing, inherent compatibility with automated production, and a cost-effective, non-destructive quality assessment strategy for sustainable, advanced lightweight manufacturing.

infographic.key_insight: A CF/PC rivet plus ultrasonic welding and TC4 surface engineering creates a stronger CFRTP-to-titanium joint while enabling real-time resistance-based process and damage monitoring.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach offers a fast, adhesive-free, metal-fastener-free joining route for lightweight aerospace structures with built-in quality assessment.
method: Hot-rivet a same-material CF/PC rivet and ultrasonic-weld the CFRTP–TC4 interface in one cycle.
Improve bonding with TC4 surface grooving and anodic oxidation to promote mechanical interlocking and interfacial interaction.
Measure interfacial resistance during welding and loading to track joining stages and damage evolution.
infographic.evidence_signal: Compared with direct welding, the joint shear strength increased by 11.08% and cross-lap tensile strength by 128.6%, with resistance stages aligning to interfacial evolution.
infographic.watch_item: The resistance-to-strength model is only preliminary, so calibration and validation across geometries, materials, and loading conditions will be needed.
infographic.paper_title: Interfacial joining and in-situ resistance monitoring in ultrasonic hybrid riveting–welding of CFRTP and titanium alloy

zh-Hans.title: CFRTP与钛合金超声复合铆接-焊接中的界面连接与原位电阻监测
zh-Hans.abstract: 钛合金与碳纤维增强热塑性复合材料（CFRTP）的复合连接对于轻量化航空航天应用至关重要，但受限于界面薄弱和监测不足。本工作提出一种基于超声CFRTP铆钉的复合铆接-焊接策略，用于连接连续碳纤维增强聚碳酸酯（CF/PC）复合材料与Ti-6Al-4 V（TC4）钛合金。该方法在单一连接循环内，将同材质CF/PC铆钉的热铆接与异种界面的超声焊接相结合，同时引入TC4表面开槽和阳极氧化作为辅助界面工程措施，以增强界面结合。与直接焊接相比，该方法使接头剪切强度提高了11.08%，交叉搭接拉伸强度提高了128.6%。显微分析表明，接头形成主要受宏观/微观机械互锁以及可能的界面化学相互作用所支配。此外，在焊接过程及随后机械加载过程中均实现了原位界面电阻监测方法。焊接期间不同的电阻阶段对应于界面演化阶段，最终接头电阻还进一步用于建立接头强度的初步预测模型。在单搭接拉伸剪切、循环加载和交叉搭接拉伸试验中，实时电阻变化反映了内部损伤的渐进演化，表明该方法具有结构健康监测的潜力。作为一种无需金属紧固件且不依赖胶黏剂的解决方案，这种集成的接头增强与基于电阻的监测方法为可持续先进轻量化制造提供了简化工艺、天然兼容自动化生产以及低成本、无损质量评估策略。

infographic.key_insight: CF/PC铆钉结合超声焊接与TC4表面工程，可形成更强的CFRTP-钛合金接头，同时实现基于电阻的实时工艺与损伤监测。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法为轻量化航空航天结构提供了一种快速、无胶黏剂、无金属紧固件的连接路径，并内置质量评估能力。
method: 将同材质CF/PC铆钉进行热铆接，并在一个循环内对CFRTP–TC4界面实施超声焊接。
通过TC4表面开槽和阳极氧化改善结合，以促进机械互锁和界面相互作用。
在焊接和加载过程中测量界面电阻，以跟踪连接阶段和损伤演化。
infographic.evidence_signal: 与直接焊接相比，接头剪切强度提高了11.08%，交叉搭接拉伸强度提高了128.6%，且电阻阶段与界面演化相一致。
infographic.watch_item: 电阻-强度模型仍为初步模型，因此需要在不同几何形状、材料和加载条件下进行标定和验证。

title: Research on motion control of weld seam tracking technology for wall-climbing robots based on DDPG algorithm
authors: Ronghao Wang, Min Li, Jiyuan Huang, Shuang Wu, Hua Bai
abstract: To address the tracking difficulties of wall-climbing robots caused by significant curvature variations of ship hulls and wheel slippage on hull surfaces, this paper proposes a visual seam tracking control method that integrates deep learning and reinforcement learning. First, a YOLOv11-OBB oriented object detection model was trained on a custom dataset of ship-hull weld seams to perform real-time state estimation for the wall-climbing robot. Subsequently, a differential steering control policy was designed based on the Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) algorithm. The reward function was optimized through a Bayesian optimization framework to automatically identify the optimal combination of weighting parameters. Finally, the real-time state information of the robot was fed into the pre-trained DDPG target network, enabling adaptive tracking of curved weld seams on the ship's outer hull. Experimental results demonstrate that, during the tracking of a 20-meter-long seam on a ship hull, this method achieves a lateral offset error of less than 2cm and a heading offset angle of less than 5°. The control stability of this method is significantly superior to traditional PID control methods, demonstrating good engineering applicability.

infographic.key_insight: A vision-guided DDPG controller enables wall-climbing robots to adaptively track curved ship-hull weld seams despite curvature changes and wheel slippage.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach improves seam-following accuracy and control stability for automated welding inspection or repair on complex marine surfaces.
method: Train a YOLOv11-OBB model on custom ship-hull seam data for real-time seam state estimation.
Use DDPG to learn differential steering control for adaptive wall-climbing robot tracking.
Optimize reward weights with Bayesian optimization to improve policy performance.
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 20-meter hull seam, the method achieved under 2 cm lateral offset and under 5° heading error, outperforming traditional PID control.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on high-quality visual detection and may be sensitive to domain shifts such as lighting, surface wear, or unseen hull geometries.
infographic.paper_title: Research on motion control of weld seam tracking technology for wall-climbing robots based on DDPG algorithm

zh-Hans.title: 基于DDPG算法的爬壁机器人焊缝跟踪技术运动控制研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 为解决船体曲率变化显著以及轮子在船体表面打滑导致的爬壁机器人跟踪困难问题，本文提出一种融合深度学习与强化学习的视觉焊缝跟踪控制方法。首先，基于船体焊缝自定义数据集训练YOLOv11-OBB定向目标检测模型，对爬壁机器人进行实时状态估计。随后，基于深度确定性策略梯度（Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient, DDPG）算法设计差速转向控制策略，并通过贝叶斯优化框架优化奖励函数，以自动确定权重参数的最优组合。最后，将机器人实时状态信息输入预训练的DDPG目标网络，从而实现对船舶外壳曲线焊缝的自适应跟踪。实验结果表明，在对一条20米长的船体焊缝进行跟踪时，该方法的横向偏差误差小于2cm，航向偏差角小于5°。与传统PID控制方法相比，该方法的控制稳定性显著更优，具有良好的工程适用性。

infographic.key_insight: 视觉引导的DDPG控制器使爬壁机器人能够在曲率变化和轮子打滑条件下自适应跟踪船体曲线焊缝。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法提高了复杂海洋表面上自动焊接检测或修复的焊缝跟踪精度与控制稳定性。
method: 基于自定义船体焊缝数据训练YOLOv11-OBB模型，用于实时焊缝状态估计。
采用DDPG学习差速转向控制，实现爬壁机器人自适应跟踪。
利用贝叶斯优化优化奖励权重，以提升策略性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一条20米长的船体焊缝上，该方法实现了小于2 cm的横向偏差和小于5°的航向误差，优于传统PID控制。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于高质量的视觉检测，并且可能对域偏移敏感，例如光照变化、表面磨损或未见过的船体几何形状。

title: Investigation of Metal-Graphite Coatings for PEMFC Bipolar Plate Using Atmospheric Plasma Thermal Spraying
authors: Guangji Song, X Fu, Haoyi Zhang, Yuehua Chen, Shuiyun Shen, Junliang Zhang
abstract: To realize the commercial application of metal bipolar plates in proton exchange membrane fuel cells (PEMFCs), it is important to develop coatings that are both durable and have low interfacial contact resistance (ICR). In this study, atmospheric plasma spraying (APS) was utilized to prepare nickel–graphite (Ni–G) and copper–graphite (Cu–G) coatings on titanium bipolar plates. This study investigates the effect of different graphite contents on the phase composition, microstructure, corrosion resistance, and electrical conductivity of the coatings. The results show that higher graphite content leads to better performance. The potentiostatic corrosion current densities of the Ni–G and Cu–G coated bipolar plates are 1.05 × 10−4 A·cm−2 and 0.91 × 10−4 A·cm−2, respectively. Similarly, the ICR values of the coated bipolar plates are 25.2 mΩ·cm−2 and 38.9 mΩ·cm−2 before and after cathodic polarization for Ni–G, and 17.4 mΩ·cm−2 and 21.2 mΩ·cm−2 for Cu–G. These results suggest that metal–graphite coatings deposited by APS represent a viable strategy for titanium bipolar plates.

infographic.key_insight: Atmospheric plasma-sprayed metal–graphite coatings can make titanium PEMFC bipolar plates both more corrosion-resistant and lower in contact resistance, with performance improving as graphite content increases.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical surface-engineering route to replace or protect metal bipolar plates in PEM fuel cells while preserving conductivity and durability.
method: APS deposited Ni–graphite and Cu–graphite coatings onto titanium bipolar plates
Varied graphite content to study phase composition, microstructure, corrosion resistance, and electrical conductivity
Evaluated performance using potentiostatic corrosion and interfacial contact resistance (ICR) measurements
infographic.evidence_signal: The coated plates achieved low potentiostatic corrosion current densities (1.05 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2 for Ni–G and 0.91 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2 for Cu–G) and improved ICR values, especially for Cu–G.
infographic.watch_item: Results are promising, but coating durability, adhesion, and long-term fuel-cell cycling performance still need validation before commercial deployment.
infographic.paper_title: Investigation of Metal-Graphite Coatings for PEMFC Bipolar Plate Using Atmospheric Plasma Thermal Spraying

zh-Hans.title: 采用大气等离子体热喷涂制备 PEMFC 双极板金属-石墨涂层的研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 为实现金属双极板在质子交换膜燃料电池（PEMFCs）中的商业化应用，开发兼具耐久性和低界面接触电阻（ICR）的涂层至关重要。本研究采用大气等离子喷涂（APS）在钛双极板上制备了镍-石墨（Ni–G）和铜-石墨（Cu–G）涂层。研究考察了不同石墨含量对涂层相组成、微观结构、耐腐蚀性和导电性的影响。结果表明，较高的石墨含量可带来更好的性能。Ni–G 和 Cu–G 涂层双极板的恒电位腐蚀电流密度分别为 1.05 × 10−4 A·cm−2 和 0.91 × 10−4 A·cm−2。类似地，Ni–G 涂层双极板在阴极极化前后的 ICR 值分别为 25.2 mΩ·cm−2 和 38.9 mΩ·cm−2，Cu–G 涂层则分别为 17.4 mΩ·cm−2 和 21.2 mΩ·cm−2。这些结果表明，APS 制备的金属-石墨涂层是钛双极板的一种可行策略。

infographic.key_insight: 大气等离子体喷涂的金属-石墨涂层可使钛基 PEMFC 双极板同时具备更强的耐腐蚀性和更低的接触电阻，且随着石墨含量增加性能提升。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为在 PEM 燃料电池中替代或保护金属双极板提供了一条实用的表面工程路径，同时保持导电性和耐久性。
method: 采用 APS 在钛双极板上沉积 Ni-石墨和 Cu-石墨涂层
改变石墨含量，研究相组成、微观结构、耐腐蚀性和导电性
通过恒电位腐蚀和界面接触电阻（ICR）测试评估性能
infographic.evidence_signal: 涂层双极板获得了较低的恒电位腐蚀电流密度（Ni–G 为 1.05 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2，Cu–G 为 0.91 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2）以及更优的 ICR 值，尤其是 Cu–G。
infographic.watch_item: 结果令人鼓舞，但在商业化应用前，仍需验证涂层耐久性、附着力以及燃料电池长期循环性能。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal neural network can jointly predict laser weld penetration state, depth, and seam morphology from weld pool images and process parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach supports in-situ quality control for laser welding by enabling faster, more reliable monitoring of weld quality during production.
method: Uses a CNN + state-space model to extract spatial and temporal features from top weld pool images.
Fuses image features with welding parameters in a multi-task prediction framework.
Builds a curated dataset to improve robustness and generalization.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm penetration-depth error, and 95.65% weld cross-section reconstruction accuracy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on the quality and representativeness of the captured weld-pool imagery, so transfer to new materials, setups, or camera conditions may require revalidation.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于预测激光焊接熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，对熔透状态和焊缝形貌的评估在确定焊接质量方面起着关键作用。本文全面介绍了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，该模型能够高精度预测熔透状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。监测平台依赖于使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机在激光焊接过程中采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从焊缝顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征与焊接参数相结合，建立了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，熔透状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝横截面重建准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光穿透焊接系统中的原位质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空神经网络可以基于熔池图像和工艺参数联合预测激光焊缝的熔透状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法通过实现焊接过程中更快速、更可靠的焊缝质量监测，支持激光焊接的原位质量控制。
method: 采用CNN + 状态空间模型从顶部熔池图像中提取空间和时间特征。
将图像特征与焊接参数融合到多任务预测框架中。
构建精选数据集以提高鲁棒性和泛化能力。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，模型实现了99.35%的熔透状态准确率、1.79毫米的熔深误差以及95.65%的焊缝横截面重建准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能取决于所采集熔池图像的质量和代表性，因此在新材料、新装置或不同相机条件下迁移应用时，可能需要重新验证。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation model with gradual source domain expansion can transfer weld penetration classification across fundamentally different welding processes, including TIG and laser welding.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables practical multi-process weld monitoring with far less manual relabeling, improving deployment robustness when changing materials, parameters, or heat-source physics.
method: Train a UDA model to learn domain-invariant penetration features.
Use gradual source domain expansion to bridge source-target process gaps.
Validate transfer on same-process and cross-process TIG/laser datasets.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process tests, and 80.48% TIG→laser and 81.13% laser→TIG in cross-process transfer, all well above the supervised baseline.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the availability of representative unlabeled target data and careful tuning of adaptation to avoid negative transfer across very different welding physics.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 基于激光与TIG焊接中无监督域适应的跨工艺焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督式深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机理的焊接工艺之间迁移时，例如从以电弧为主的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊迁移到基于小孔效应的激光焊时，其性能往往会因域偏移而显著下降。为克服这一局限，我们提出了一种集成渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督域适应（UDA）框架。基于专用的TIG和激光焊数据集进行评估后，我们的方法在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高准确率。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，它在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，较监督基线分别提升35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨工艺场景中，从TIG到激光的准确率达到80.48%，从激光到TIG的准确率达到81.13%，分别较基线提高43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持可分辨类别边界的同时学习到了域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重新标注成本，并增强了不同焊接系统之间智能监测的通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督域适应模型能够在根本不同的焊接工艺之间迁移焊缝熔深分类，包括TIG焊和激光焊。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得多工艺焊接监测具备更强的实用性，并大幅减少人工重新标注工作，在材料、参数或热源物理机制变化时提升部署鲁棒性。
method: 训练UDA模型以学习域不变的熔深特征。
利用渐进式源域扩展弥合源域与目标域工艺差距。
在同工艺和跨工艺TIG/激光数据集上验证迁移效果。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告显示，同工艺测试中TIGFH和LSPS的平均准确率分别为90.65%和90.72%，跨工艺迁移中TIG→激光和激光→TIG分别为80.48%和81.13%，均明显优于监督基线。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于代表性未标注目标域数据的可获得性，以及对适应过程的精细调参，以避免在物理机理差异很大的焊接场景中出现负迁移。

authors: Ghulam Anwer, Bappa Acherjee

infographic.engineering_relevance: This is relevant for polymer joining and manufacturing because it offers a computational route to balance weld quality metrics and process efficiency without relying solely on trial-and-error experiments.

NSGA-II performs multi-objective optimization of the predicted responses
The integrated workflow supports parameter selection for improved weld characteristics

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: D-gun Al2O3-TiO2 coating significantly improves the wear resistance of Ti-6Al-4V, and random forest best predicts wear from operating conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study supports using ceramic detonation-sprayed coatings to extend the life of aerospace and biomedical Ti-6Al-4V components under sliding contact.
method: Applied ~200 µm Al2O3-TiO2 coating to Ti-6Al-4V using detonation gun spraying.
Evaluated wear with pin-on-disc tests per ASTM G99 at 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min against EN31 steel.
Trained ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from tribological parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM showed reduced wear and protective tribo-layer formation on coated surfaces, while random forest achieved the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error among the tested models.
infographic.watch_item: The coating/process benefits were demonstrated on a limited test matrix, so model generalization to other loads, speeds, environments, or counterface materials may be constrained.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun 涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学性能增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V 合金广泛应用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋领域。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，考察了 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层与未涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学行为。在受控条件下（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷距：180 mm，粒子速度约 1200 m/s），采用爆炸喷涂枪（D-gun）工艺在 Ti-6Al-4V 合金表面制备了约 200 µm 厚的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层。按照 ASTM G99 标准，使用销-盘试验机测试了样品的磨损行为。试验在与 EN31 钢对偶面的条件下进行，法向载荷为 40–100 N，滑动速度为 100–200 rpm，持续时间为 20–40 min。扫描电子显微镜显示，涂层表面的磨损较低，并形成了保护性的摩擦层。基于滑动参数建立了人工神经网络、K 近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，用于预测磨损。随机森林因平均百分比误差和均方误差更小而被证明是最佳选择。结果表明，D-gun 沉积的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: D-gun Al2O3-TiO2 涂层显著提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性，而随机森林最能根据工况条件预测磨损。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究支持采用陶瓷爆炸喷涂涂层，以延长航空航天和生物医学 Ti-6Al-4V 构件在滑动接触条件下的服役寿命。
method: 采用爆炸喷涂枪（detonation gun spraying）在 Ti-6Al-4V 上制备约 200 µm 的 Al2O3-TiO2 涂层。
按照 ASTM G99，使用销-盘试验在 40–100 N、100–200 rpm 和 20–40 min 条件下、与 EN31 钢对偶面评估磨损。
训练 ANN、KNN 和随机森林模型，根据摩擦学参数预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM 显示涂层表面的磨损减轻并形成了保护性摩擦层，而在所测试模型中，随机森林的平均百分比误差和均方误差最低。
infographic.watch_item: 该涂层/工艺优势仅在有限的试验矩阵上得到验证，因此模型对其他载荷、速度、环境或对偶材料的泛化能力可能受限。

title: QUÉ ES LA CONSCIENCIA. Hacia un Monismo Materialista Constructivista: El Entramado Absoluto de Consciencias Intrínsecas, Conservación Informática y Dinámica de Densidades en el Ecosistema Universal (2008–2026)
authors: Jesús Félix Díaz Manríquez
abstract: Abstract This paper formalizes a non-reductive, strictly physicalist ontological framework developed In 2008 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18512353 and presented now, 2026, better explained, which refutes both dualistic mysticism and eliminative materialism. I present the cosmos as an absolute, 100% material continuum governed by an inherent constructivist vocation, explicitly rejecting the existence of "inert matter" and actual thermodynamic entropy. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20366464 Conscience is redefined not as a centralized epiphenomenon of the brain, but as an intrinsic, decentralized property of physical assembly present across all scales of matter—from the cold-welding cohesion of metals in a vacuum to complex cellular aggregates. Within this framework, the human brain acts merely as a processing interface for a vast network of micro-consciousnesses that wrongly construct an idea that comes from within. Thoughts are characterized as physical emissions of variable material density that continuously alter the organism's biological state and it impregnates. Finally, we establish the physical laws of existential permanence of conscience: information is the primordial physical bit, and the structural cohesion or "quasi-perfection" of its material assembly determines whether an informational matrix achieves post-biological evolution or undergoes informant deconstruction and reintegration into the primary ecosystem around it. Resumen Este documento formaliza un marco ontológico materialista no reductivo desarrollado en 2008 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18512353 y presentado ahora en 2026, mejor explicado y el cual refuta tanto el misticismo dualista como el materialismo eliminativo clásico. Se propone un cosmos compuesto por un continuo 100% material y gobernado por una vocación constructivista intrínseca, rechazando la existencia de la "materia inerte" y de la entropía real (pérdida de información). https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20366464 La consciencia se redefine como una propiedad inherente de autoorganización y armado físico, presente en todas las escalas de la materia—desde la cohesión por soldadura en frío de los metales en el vacío hasta los macrocosmos biológicos. El cerebro humano se desplaza de su rol creador para ser caracterizado únicamente como una interfaz de traducción de un entramado absoluto de millones de micro-conciencias celulares y atómicas autónomas que confunde como propias. Los procesos mentales se definen como emisiones físicas reales de densidades variables que inundan e irradian el cuerpo, determinando su balance biológico y adhiriéndose a su estructura como información. Finalmente, se postulan las leyes físicas de la supervivencia existencial: la información es el bit primordial y físico de nuestro fractal; la fortaleza y "cuasi perfección" del armado informático logrado en vida determina si la estructura mantiene su agrupación evolutiva tras el cese biológico o si experimenta una deconstrucción informática (fricción por cinismo, deconstrucción sin propósito o miedo), reintegrando sus componentes elementales al ecosistema material de intercambio dominante.
venue: Zenodo (CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research)

infographic.key_insight: The paper proposes a highly unconventional materialist ontology in which "consciousness" is treated as an intrinsic physical property of matter across scales, rather than as a brain-only phenomenon.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For materials and coating audiences, the only practical takeaway is a conceptual claim that material cohesion, assembly, and information retention are treated as linked physical-state variables in complex matter systems.
method: Defines a non-reductive physicalist framework built from prior 2008 and 2026 theoretical writings.
Uses philosophical reinterpretation of matter, information, and entropy rather than experimental microstructure or process data.
Frames cohesion, self-organization, and "density" as the governing variables for post-biological or deconstructive evolution.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract does not report experimental datasets, process parameters, microscopy, or performance metrics; it is primarily a conceptual/theoretical argument.
infographic.watch_item: Claims rejecting inert matter and real entropy are not supported by standard materials science evidence and should be treated as speculative rather than design guidance.

zh-Hans.title: 什么是意识：走向建构主义唯物论——内禀意识的绝对编织、信息守恒与宇宙生态系统中的密度动力学（2008–2026）
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 本文形式化了一种非还原论、严格物理主义的本体论框架，该框架于2008年提出 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18512353，并在2026年以更清晰的方式呈现；它否定了二元论神秘主义和消除论唯物主义。我将宇宙表述为一个绝对的、100%物质的连续体，其受一种内在的建构主义倾向所支配，并明确拒绝“惰性物质”和实际热力学熵的存在。 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20366464 意识不再被重新定义为大脑的中心化副现象，而是物质组装所固有的、去中心化的属性，存在于物质的各个尺度上——从真空中金属的冷焊凝聚到复杂的细胞聚集体。在这一框架下，人脑仅仅充当一个庞大的微观意识网络的处理接口，这些微观意识错误地建构出一种来自内部的观念。思想被表征为具有可变物质密度的物理发射，它们持续改变机体的生物状态并对其施加影响。最后，我们建立了意识存在的物理定律：信息是原初的物理比特，而其物质组装的结构凝聚性或“准完美性”决定了一个信息矩阵是实现生物后进化，还是经历信息解构并重新融入其周围的原初生态系统。Resumen 本文形式化了一种非还原论的唯物主义本体论框架，该框架于2008年提出 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18512353，并在2026年以更清晰的方式呈现；它否定了二元论神秘主义和经典消除论唯物主义。本文提出宇宙由一个100%物质的连续体构成，并受一种内在的建构主义倾向所支配，否认“惰性物质”和真实熵（信息丢失）的存在。 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20366464 意识被重新定义为一种内在的自组织与物理组装属性，存在于物质的所有尺度上——从真空中金属的冷焊凝聚到生物宏观结构。人脑不再被赋予创造者角色，而仅被描述为一个翻译接口，用于处理由数百万自主的细胞与原子微意识构成的绝对编织，而这些微意识被误认为是自身的。心理过程被定义为真实的物理发射，其密度可变，充满并辐射整个身体，决定其生物平衡，并作为信息附着于其结构之上。最后，本文提出存在性存续的物理定律：信息是我们分形中的原初物理比特；生前实现的信息组装的强度与“准完美性”决定了该结构在生物终止后是否维持其演化聚合状态，或是否经历信息解构（犬儒摩擦、无目的的解构或恐惧），并将其基本组成部分重新融入占主导地位的物质交换生态系统。

infographic.key_insight: 本文提出一种高度非常规的唯物主义本体论，将“意识”视为跨尺度物质所具有的内在物理属性，而非仅限于大脑的现象。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于材料与涂层受众而言，唯一的实际启示是一个概念性主张：材料凝聚、组装与信息保留被视为复杂物质系统中彼此关联的物理状态变量。
method: 基于2008年和2026年的既有理论著作，定义了一个非还原论的物理主义框架。
采用对物质、信息和熵的哲学性重新诠释，而非实验微观结构或工艺数据。
将凝聚、自组织和“密度”表述为生物后或解构性演化的控制变量。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要未报告实验数据集、工艺参数、显微镜观察或性能指标；其主要是一种概念性/理论性论证。
infographic.watch_item: 否定惰性物质和真实熵的主张未得到标准材料科学证据支持，应被视为推测性内容，而非设计指导。

title: QUÉ ES LA CONSCIENCIA. Hacia un Monismo Materialista Constructivista: El Entramado Absoluto de Consciencias Intrínsecas, Conservación Informática y Dinámica de Densidades en el Ecosistema Universal (2008–2026)
authors: Jesús Félix Díaz Manríquez
abstract: Abstract This paper formalizes a non-reductive, strictly physicalist ontological framework developed In 2008 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18512353 and presented now, 2026, better explained, which refutes both dualistic mysticism and eliminative materialism. I present the cosmos as an absolute, 100% material continuum governed by an inherent constructivist vocation, explicitly rejecting the existence of "inert matter" and actual thermodynamic entropy. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20366464 Conscience is redefined not as a centralized epiphenomenon of the brain, but as an intrinsic, decentralized property of physical assembly present across all scales of matter—from the cold-welding cohesion of metals in a vacuum to complex cellular aggregates. Within this framework, the human brain acts merely as a processing interface for a vast network of micro-consciousnesses that wrongly construct an idea that comes from within. Thoughts are characterized as physical emissions of variable material density that continuously alter the organism's biological state and it impregnates. Finally, we establish the physical laws of existential permanence of conscience: information is the primordial physical bit, and the structural cohesion or "quasi-perfection" of its material assembly determines whether an informational matrix achieves post-biological evolution or undergoes informant deconstruction and reintegration into the primary ecosystem around it. Resumen Este documento formaliza un marco ontológico materialista no reductivo desarrollado en 2008 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18512353 y presentado ahora en 2026, mejor explicado y el cual refuta tanto el misticismo dualista como el materialismo eliminativo clásico. Se propone un cosmos compuesto por un continuo 100% material y gobernado por una vocación constructivista intrínseca, rechazando la existencia de la "materia inerte" y de la entropía real (pérdida de información). https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20366464 La consciencia se redefine como una propiedad inherente de autoorganización y armado físico, presente en todas las escalas de la materia—desde la cohesión por soldadura en frío de los metales en el vacío hasta los macrocosmos biológicos. El cerebro humano se desplaza de su rol creador para ser caracterizado únicamente como una interfaz de traducción de un entramado absoluto de millones de micro-conciencias celulares y atómicas autónomas que confunde como propias. Los procesos mentales se definen como emisiones físicas reales de densidades variables que inundan e irradian el cuerpo, determinando su balance biológico y adhiriéndose a su estructura como información. Finalmente, se postulan las leyes físicas de la supervivencia existencial: la información es el bit primordial y físico de nuestro fractal; la fortaleza y "cuasi perfección" del armado informático logrado en vida determina si la estructura mantiene su agrupación evolutiva tras el cese biológico o si experimenta una deconstrucción informática (fricción por cinismo, deconstrucción sin propósito o miedo), reintegrando sus componentes elementales al ecosistema material de intercambio dominante.
venue: Zenodo (CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research)

infographic.key_insight: The paper proposes a speculative materialist ontology in which consciousness is treated as an intrinsic property of physical assembly and information conservation across all scales of matter.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For coating, welding, and machine-design contexts, the abstract mainly suggests a metaphorical framework linking microstructural cohesion, density evolution, and information retention rather than a testable materials model.
method: Defines a non-reductive physicalist framework built around intrinsic consciousness and constructivist material organization.
Interprets thoughts and biological change as physical emissions that alter material density and state.
Introduces laws of informational permanence based on structural cohesion, quasi-perfection, and post-biological evolution.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract cites prior DOI-linked works and a 2008-to-2026 development timeline, but it provides no experimental dataset, simulation, or validation metrics.
infographic.watch_item: The claims are highly speculative and do not present a conventional engineering methodology, so they should not be treated as validated materials-science evidence.

zh-Hans.title: 什么是意识：迈向一种建构主义唯物一元论——内在意识的绝对编织体、信息守恒与宇宙生态系统中的密度动力学（2008–2026）
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 本文形式化提出一个非还原论、严格物理主义的本体论框架，该框架于2008年提出 https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18512353，并于2026年以更清晰的方式重新呈现；它驳斥了二元论神秘主义和取消论唯物主义。我将宇宙表述为一个绝对的、100%物质的连续体，由一种内在的建构主义倾向所支配，并明确否认“惰性物质”和实际热力学熵的存在。https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20366464 意识不再被重新定义为大脑的中央性副现象，而是物理组装的一种内在、去中心化属性，存在于物质的所有尺度之中——从真空中金属的冷焊凝聚到复杂的细胞聚合体皆然。在这一框架下，人脑仅充当一个庞大的微观意识网络的处理接口；该网络错误地建构出一个来自内部的观念。思想被表征为具有可变物质密度的物理发射，它们持续改变有机体的生物状态，并使其被浸染。最后，我们建立了意识存在性永续的物理定律：信息是原初的物理比特，其物质组装的结构凝聚性或“准完美性”决定一个信息矩阵是实现生物后进化，还是经历信息体解构并重新并入其周围的原初生态系统。

infographic.key_insight: 本文提出一种推测性的唯物主义本体论，将意识视为物理组装的内在属性，以及跨越物质所有尺度的信息守恒。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于涂层、焊接和机械设计语境，该摘要主要暗示一种隐喻性框架，将微观结构凝聚、密度演化与信息保留联系起来，而非一种可检验的材料模型。
method: 定义一个围绕内在意识与建构主义物质组织构建的非还原论物理主义框架。
将思想和生物变化解释为会改变物质密度与状态的物理发射。
引入基于结构凝聚性、准完美性以及生物后进化的信息永续定律。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要引用了带DOI的前期工作以及2008至2026年的发展时间线，但未提供实验数据集、模拟或验证指标。
infographic.watch_item: 这些主张具有高度推测性，且未提出传统的工程方法，因此不应被视为经过验证的材料科学证据。
